/admin/content/files.reason: Path used by files view (view.files.page_1). Used for admin file management.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: Path used by scheduler_scheduled_media view (view.scheduler_scheduled_media.overview). Used for scheduled media administration.

/blog.reason: Existing path alias already points to /page/2 (a Canvas page). Also conflicts with blog view RSS feed at /blog/feed.

/moderated-content.reason: Path has no route match and no existing alias. Safe to use.

/search.reason: Route exists: view.search.page. This is the core search view endpoint.

/this-is-free-xyz.reason: Path has no route match and no existing alias. Safe to use.
